d: An addition to Preferences for simple Theme and Font adjustment.  Especially useful for Windows users. Also supports a layered CSS theming system with CSS Themes, CSS Patches, and a personal user override.

Import contacts from vCard files (.vcf). Supports vCard versions 1, 2.1, 3.0, and 4.0. Unhandled properties are preserved as Person attributes. Variant Call Format (DNA) files are detected and rejected.
Export contacts to vCard files (.vcf). Supports vCard versions 1, 2.1, 3.0, and 4.0 (default: 3.0).

CSV is a common spreadsheet format.
This enhanced exporter includes events, citations, and media.
You can change this behavior in the 'Configure active view' of any list-based view
Two-tab developer reference gramplet showing the current locale and a searchable, sortable table of all Gramps string constants.
